calls.content:
### Work Breakdown Structure
- Backend Development
  - Design database schema for reviews and moderation status (2 person days)
  - Implement API endpoints for submitting reviews (3 person days)
  - Implement API endpoints for moderation workflow (3 person days)
  - Implement API endpoints for fetching reviews and average rating (2 person days)
  - Integrate photo upload and storage (4 person days)
- Frontend Development
  - Add review submission UI (star rating, text, photo upload) (4 person days)
  - Add moderation interface for admin users (3 person days)
  - Display reviews and average rating on product pages (3 person days)
- Moderation Workflow
  - Develop moderation queue and notification system (3 person days)
  - Implement review approval/rejection actions (2 person days)
- Testing & QA
  - Unit and integration testing for backend (3 person days)
  - UI testing and cross-browser checks (2 person days)
  - User acceptance testing and bug fixes (3 person days)
- Deployment & Documentation
  - Update deployment scripts and environment configs (2 person days)
  - Write user/admin documentation (2 person days)

### Total Estimate
38 person days

### Assumptions
- Existing e-commerce platform supports user authentication and product catalog.
- Photo uploads are limited to standard image formats and stored in existing cloud storage.
- Moderation will be handled by internal staff via a simple admin interface.
- No advanced moderation features (e.g., AI, automated flagging) are required.
- The frontend is built with a modern framework (e.g., React or Vue).
- The backend is RESTful and uses a relational database.
- No localization or accessibility enhancements beyond current standards.
- Holiday season deadline allows for 2 months of development time.
